Imports

wtf8, wcwidth

Types

char8 = uint8
char16 = int16
char32 = int32

Consts

CTRL = 0x20000000
DELETE_KEY = 0x10E00000
DOWN_ARROW_KEY = 0x10400000
END_KEY = 0x10C00000
ESC_KEY = 0x0000001B
HOME_KEY = 0x10A00000
LEFT_ARROW_KEY = 0x10800000
META = 0x40000000
PAGE_DOWN_KEY = 0x11200000
PAGE_UP_KEY = 0x11000000
PROMPT_MAX_LINE = 4096
RIGHT_ARROW_KEY = 0x10600000
UP_ARROW_KEY = 0x10200000
